start_date.title: Replication Start Date
start_date.description: UTC date and time in the format 2020-10-01T00:00:00Z. Any data before this date will not be replicated.

lookback_window.title: Lookback window
lookback_window.description: How far into the past to look for records. (in minutes)

sync_subaccounts.title: Capture Subaccount Data
sync_subaccounts.description: Whether to capture data belonging to subaccounts in addition to the authenticated account. Disable this if you authenticate with an API Key (SID and Secret) instead of an Auth Token, since Twilio denies API Key access to subaccount resources. Requires a Main API Key or an Auth Token; Standard API Keys cannot list accounts.
